commit.message:
fix(mcp): stateless sessions, CVE fixes, version bumps (#84)

## Summary

- **Auth fixes**: revert access token TTL to 1h (InvalidGrantError now
handled correctly); make persist synchronous; fix stateless session
handling
- **Refactor**: extract `server.json` sync into reusable script
(`scripts/sync-server-json.mjs`) with tests
- **CVE fixes** (Dependabot alerts #26, #31, #32, #11):
- `mcp-server`: bump `fast-xml-parser` override `^5.3.4` → `^5.3.8` → 0
vulnerabilities
- `nextcloud-app`: add overrides for `immutable ^5.1.5`, `dompurify
^3.3.2`, `qs ^6.14.2`
- **webdav**: upgrade to `^5.9.0`
- **Version bumps**: `mcp-server` 0.1.39 → 0.1.40, `nextcloud-app`
0.1.31 → 0.1.41

## Test plan

- [x] `mcp-server` unit tests: 323 passed
- [x] `npm audit` in `mcp-server`: 0 vulnerabilities
- [x] OAuth e2e (`./scripts/test-oauth.sh`): all steps passed
- [x] Functional tools (`make test-tools`): all 10 steps passed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add FastAPI async server + README

API (src/img2voice/api.py):
  - POST /tasks: upload images -> task_id (202 Accepted)
  - GET  /tasks/{id}: poll status (pending/processing/done/failed)
  - GET  /tasks/{id}/files/text: download output.txt
  - GET  /tasks/{id}/files/audio: download output.mp3
  - GET  /tasks: list all tasks
  - asyncio.Queue serialises GPU jobs; OCR runs in ThreadPoolExecutor
  - TTS awaited directly via new text_to_speech_async()

tts.py: add text_to_speech_async() for use inside async event loops
main.py: add 'serve' CLI command (wraps uvicorn)
pyproject.toml: add fastapi, uvicorn[standard], python-multipart; bump to 0.3.0
README.md: full usage guide for CLI and API with curl/Python examples

commit.message:
Add qop=auth support to SIP digest authentication

Telnyx INVITE proxy challenges require qop=auth with cnonce and nc per
RFC 2617 §3.2.2. Without these, the authenticated re-INVITE gets rejected
with a second 407. Also refactors auth header building into DigestChallenge
method to centralize opaque/qop handling.

Implement Phase 4: terminal groups with tab bar

Introduce terminal groups, each with an independent split layout and
active terminal. A tab bar above the terminal area lets users switch
between groups while preserving scrollback via CSS hiding. Closing the
last terminal in a group removes the group automatically.

- Rewrite Zustand store to be group-aware (addGroup, removeGroup,
  setActiveGroup, renameGroup; all terminal actions scoped to groups)
- Add TerminalTabs component with rename-on-double-click and close
- Thread groupId prop through SplitContainer and TerminalPane for
  per-group isActive/isVisible selectors

- Update all tests for new state shape (107 tests passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: increase ensureVote timeout to fix flaky TestStateOversizedBlock (#2842)

## Summary

- Introduce a separate `ensureVoteTimeout` (2s) for the `ensureVote`
helper, replacing the shared `ensureTimeout` (200ms)
- The 200ms timeout was too tight for CI machines running with the race
detector, causing `TestStateOversizedBlock/max_size,_correct_block` to
flake when processing prevotes and producing a precommit took longer
than expected
- The shorter `ensureTimeout` used by "ensure no event" helpers remains
unaffected

## Test plan

- [x] Ran `TestStateOversizedBlock/max_size,_correct_block` 5 times with
`-race` — all passed

fix: Next.js 15 ssr:false in Server Components — split into page-client (v5.38.2)

Next.js 15 disallows dynamic(..., { ssr: false }) in Server Components.
Split 6 pages into server page.tsx (keeps metadata) + client page-client.tsx
(does the dynamic import with ssr: false).

Affected: admin/marketplace, leads, marketplace-crm (dashboard, orders,
portfolio, settings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(charts): add Redis/MongoDB ports to Istio excludeOutboundPorts

Add port 6379 (Redis) and 27017 (MongoDB) to the Istio sidecar
excludeOutboundPorts annotation to prevent Istio from intercepting
direct connections to Redis and MongoDB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix npm install: wait for file close before extracting, bump to 0.4.1

The download was truncated because resolve() was called before the file
descriptor was fully closed. Use pipe() with file "close" event to ensure
the archive is complete before tar extraction. Bump to 0.4.1 since npm
won't allow republishing the same version.

commit.message:
fix: check PHARs exist before requiring phive

Move the "all already installed" early-exit check before the phive
availability check. If all PHARs and Rector are already present,
phive is not needed and the script exits cleanly.

This fixes environments where PHARs are manually installed (e.g.
downloaded from GitHub releases) but phive is not available.

feat: notify all monitored repo commits in change detection message

notify_change_detected()가 동적 repo_paths 딕셔너리를 받도록 변경.
deployer가 __main__에서 구성한 monitored_repos를 통해 모든 활성 폴러의
커밋을 변경점 알림에 포함하도록 수정.

기존에 soulstream은 paths.get("soulstream") 키 불일치로 누락되었고,
seosoyoung-plugins는 알림 로직에 아예 포함되지 않았던 버그도 함께 해결.

commit.message:
Replace JuiceFS with rclone+B2+zstd compression pipeline

- New worker/compression.py: smart file classification by VFX type
  (EXR header check, VDB batching, probe for unknown types)
- New worker/manifest.py: SHA-256 content-addressable manifests
- Rewritten worker/sync_agent.py: rclone+B2 sync with shared cache
  (/workspace/cache/ with Redis locks), symlink-based task isolation
  (/workspace/tasks/{id}/), intermediate vs final output handling
- Updated worker/config.py: B2 credentials + compression settings
- Updated worker/executor.py: B2 sync instead of JuiceFS
- Updated worker/cache_manager.py: SHA-256 LRU cache eviction
- Updated Docker: zstd + rclone instead of JuiceFS binary
- Updated HDA: B2 Storage & Compression UI, transfer metrics,
  SHA-256 manifests, output_type (intermediate/final) per task

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wire mock_parts through Arena tool executor and schema (#663)

The Arena tool executor was discarding multimodal Parts from tool
results, breaking the mock_parts feature on tool descriptors. This
propagates toolResult.Parts to MessageToolResult so mock tools can
return images/audio alongside JSON results.

Also adds MockPartSpec/MockMediaSpec to pkg/config ToolSpec and
regenerates JSON schemas so mock_parts passes schema validation.

Documents OpenAI Responses API and Gemini streaming as text-only
for tool results (API limitations, not bugs).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Terminal — full-bleed layout aligned to nav, zero section padding, dynamic chart height

- #tab-terminal: padding:0 !important + height:calc(100vh-102px) to sit flush below header+ticker
- term-wrap: height:100% (was calc(100vh-56px) which overflowed)
- All bars (topbar/segbar/subbar/symbar) flex-wrap:nowrap + overflow-x:auto — single row, no wrapping
- topbar compact: min-height 42px, no-wrap, horizontal scroll on small screens
- _buildCharts(): replaced fixed totalH calc with _getChartHeight() that measures actual term-body
- ResizeObserver now updates both chart height AND width on any container resize (sidebar collapse etc)
- Added window resize listener for chart dimension sync
- vol chart height 72px, toolbar 32px all accounted in height calc
- Removed invalid CSS sibling selector that caused issues
